policies.inbound:
<set-variable name="userDomain" value="@{
            var auth = context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("Authorization","");
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(auth)) return "unknown";
            try {
                var jwt = auth.Replace("Bearer ", "");
                var parts = jwt.Split('.');
                if (parts.Length < 2) return "unknown";
                var payload = System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetString(
                    Convert.FromBase64String(parts[1].PadRight(parts[1].Length + (4 - parts[1].Length % 4) % 4, '=')));
                var json = Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject.Parse(payload);
                return json["domain"]?.ToString() ?? json["tid"]?.ToString() ?? "unknown";
            } catch {
                return "unknown";
            }
        }" />

        
        
            @((string)context.Variables["userDomain"])
        

        
        
            
                
                    Authorization
                    domain,page,pageSize,search
                
            
        

        
        
            
                
                    Authorization
